name: profiles/active.sh resolves the precedence chain per the profile system contract on demand
command:
mkdir -p profiles && printf 'extends: [base.yaml]
rules:
  no-eval: error
' > profiles/p.yaml && printf 'rules:
  no-eval: warn
  no-console: warn
' > profiles/base.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --resolve profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'no-eval=error' out.txt && grep -q 'no-console=warn' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
